SMALL CLAIM APPEALS

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant: Joel Carron, is present
Respondent/Plaintiff: SF Rental Solution, LLC, represented by Counsel, Kevin P. Greenquist, is present
Thomas Ivelli, representative for SF Rental Solutions, Respondent/Plaintiff, present

This cause comes on reqularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witness are sworn.

Appellant/Defendant: Joel Carron, testifies on his own behalf

no exhibits introduced by appellant.

Counsel, Kevin P. Greenquist, testifies on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff, SF Rental Solutions,
Thomas Ivellie, representative for SF rental solutions, testifies on behalf of respondent SF rental solutions

The follwoing documentary evidence is introduced

Exhibit 1 - Copy of lease agrement
Exhibit 2 - letter re: utility reimbursement bill from Thomas Ivelli
Exhibit 3 - copy of letter to Mr. Carron dated July 25, 2017

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
